About Me

I am an AI & Fullstack Engineer with over a decade of experience in architecting and deploying production-grade web applications and intelligent systems.

My Expertise

My work sits at the intersection of robust backend engineering and cutting-edge artificial intelligence. I specialize in:

  • LLM Integrations & RAG Pipelines: Designing systems that allow businesses to interact dynamically with their knowledge bases using tools like LangChain, LangGraph, and OpenAI/Google APIs.
  • Full-Stack Architecture: Building scalable frontend interfaces with React, Angular, and Next.js, powered by reliable backend services in Node.js and Laravel.
  • Cloud & DevOps: Ensuring smooth deployment, continuous integration, and infrastructure management across AWS, Azure, and GCP using Docker.
  • Technical Leadership: Leading projects from requirements gathering to delivery, particularly across fintech, recruitment, and construction sectors.

My Journey

I began my career in 2011 as a Software Development Tutor in Nairobi, teaching core development skills and mentoring students in Java and client-server architecture. Since then, I've transitioned through specialized roles including a Junior Software Developer working on microfinance platforms, a Full Stack Developer handling client engagements, and a Blockchain Developer building smart contracts and DApps.

Today, at Elikia Technologies, I focus heavily on AI workflow automations and RAG pipelines, helping enterprise clients leverage the power of Large Language Models.

Let's Connect

Whether you are looking to integrate AI into your workflow, need a robust web application, or just want to chat about technology, I'm always open to connecting.
